Home > Coding Assistant > Trae

Trae

★★★★☆ 5000 autocompletions + 3 basic usage Paid from: $5/month

Visit official site →

ByteDance's AI-powered coding IDE with SOLO mode for autonomous development tasks. Free tier offers 5000 autocompletions/month. Pro starts at $15/month. Supports Claude, GPT, and other leading models.

Free Credits Details

  • Amount: 5000 autocompletions + 3 basic usage
  • Reset: Resets monthly
  • Watermark: No
  • Commercial: Free tier allows commercial use

Key Features

  • SOLO autonomous development mode
  • Code autocompletion
  • Multi-model support
  • Cloud parallel tasks
  • Built-in IDE
  • Web/Desktop/App available

Pros

  • Free tier with 5000 autocompletions/month
  • SOLO mode handles entire dev tasks autonomously
  • Supports Claude, GPT, and other leading models
  • 7-day free Pro trial for new users

Cons

  • Free tier has limited SOLO mode
  • Lower queue priority on free plan
  • Premium models require paid plan

Tips

  • Claim the 7-day Pro trial first to explore full features
  • Free tier's 5000 autocompletions are enough for daily coding
  • SOLO mode is great for rapid prototyping
